_comment: Board visual assets for Studio's BOARD view. cad_step = the vendor's published 3D CAD (STEP); build-board-assets.sh converts it to <id>.glb via the authenticated `zoo` CLI. datasheet = vendor PDF. Only VERIFIED vendor URLs go here — unverified entries leave cad_step null and the UI shows the product page only.

feather-rp2040.note: Adafruit publishes STEP on the product/learn page — confirm exact URL before adding.

portenta-h7.note: Arduino publishes STEP in the Portenta H7 resources — confirm exact URL.
